title: [ValueTracking] Recognize non-negative subtraction patterns
author: user1342234
description:
Fix missed optimization for nonnegative `b - a` (issue #146131)

The optimizer currently fails to recognize that `b - a` (signed subtraction) is provably nonnegative in patterns like:

- `if (b < a) a = b; return (int32_t)(b - a);`
- Equivalently, `return (b < a ? 0 : (int32_t)(b - a));`

On x86-64, this should generate shorter/better code in affected cases

Fixes #146131

tests.test_body:
define i64 @select_reversed(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %b, %a
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %b, %a
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 %sub, i32 0
  %ext = sext i32 %cond to i64
  ret i64 %ext
}

define i64 @func3(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %b, %a
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %b, %a
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 0, i32 %sub
  %conv = sext i32 %cond to i64
  ret i64 %conv
}

define i64 @neg_select_nonzero(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %b, %a
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %b, %a
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 1, i32 %sub
  %ext = sext i32 %cond to i64
  ret i64 %ext
}

define i64 @neg_wrong_cmp_select(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %a, %b
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %b, %a
  %cond = select i1 %cmp, i32 0, i32 %sub
  %ext = sext i32 %cond to i64
  ret i64 %ext
}

comments.author: user1342234
comments.body:
@nikic 
Sorry!

Updated with pre-commit baseline + functional diff commits by InstCombine guide.


Added Alive2 proofs:

- Select pattern: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/YjBg-S
- smin pattern: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/VZiU4F

Full-width versions timed out, so I reduced to i8


I'm not entirely sure this is the correct approach to solve this. Instead, should I have written patterns in ```InstCombineCasts.cpp``` at ```visitSExt```?

<!--LLVM CODE FORMAT COMMENT: {clang-format}-->


:warning: C/C++ code formatter, clang-format found issues in your code. :warning:

<details>
<summary>
You can test this locally with the following command:
</summary>

``````````bash
git-clang-format --diff origin/main HEAD --extensions cpp -- llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp --diff_from_common_commit
``````````

:warning:
The reproduction instructions above might return results for more than one PR
in a stack if you are using a stacked PR workflow. You can limit the results by
changing `origin/main` to the base branch/commit you want to compare against.
:warning:

</details>

<details>
<summary>
View the diff from clang-format here.
</summary>

``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
index 34e3d3099..b5ec29ecf 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
@@ -519,7 +519,7 @@ static void computeKnownBitsAddSub(bool Add, const Value *Op0, const Value *Op1,
     KnownOut.makeNonNegative();
 
   if (!Add && !KnownOut.isNonNegative() &&
-        isSubtractionKnownNonNegative(Op0, Op1))
+      isSubtractionKnownNonNegative(Op0, Op1))
     KnownOut.makeNonNegative();
 
   if (Add)
@@ -1525,10 +1525,10 @@ static void computeKnownBitsFromOperator(const Operator *I,
     Known =
         ComputeForArm(I->getOperand(1), /*Invert=*/false)
             .intersectWith(ComputeForArm(I->getOperand(2), /*Invert=*/true));
-            
+
     if (isSelectKnownNonNegative(cast<SelectInst>(I)))
-    Known.makeNonNegative();
-    
+      Known.makeNonNegative();
+
     break;
   }
   case Instruction::FPTrunc:

``````````

</details>
